truesight_description:
Custom Tooltip System
With option to put images, titles, and icons!
truesight_small_title: You're seeing it in use right now!
skinwalker_description:
Account Switcher System
With password confirmation (for safety!) and storing of avatar, groupcolor, name and rank.
skinwalker_small_title: With password confirmation (for safety!) and storing of avatar, groupcolor, name and rank.
huntersmark_description:
Thread Tagging System
Including a custom HTML search page!
huntersmark_small_title: Including a custom HTML search page!
scrying_description:
User Tooltip System
Preview of different user profile data.
scrying_small_title: Preview of different user profile data.
sanctuary_description:
Trigger Warnings System
With options for different severity of warnings.
sanctuary_small_title: With options for different severity of warnings
page_not_found_desc: Try with some of these pages instead!
truesight_about_content:
Truesight is a jQuery tooltip system that allows you to show:
  • Text: Using the attribute title.
  • Header: Using the attribute data-tooltip-head.
  • Image: Using the attribute data-tooltip-image.
  • Icon: Using the attribute data-tooltip-icon.

This tooltip works in every element that has any of these attributes in its body.
truesight_install_content:
Include jQuery and your script truesight.js. Forumotion has jQuery by default in your overall_header unless you have removed it. You can use truesight.js two different ways:
  • Direct install: Include the contents of truesight.js in a new JS page in your Admin Panel.
  • External install: Upload truesight.js to your dropbox or github, and link it to your overall_header with <script src="truesight.js"></script>.
truesight_examples_content:
Simple tooltip.
<span title="Tooltip text">Simple tooltip.</span>
Tooltip with a header.
<span data-tooltip-head="Tooltip header" title="Tooltip text">Tooltip with a header.</span>
Tooltip with a header and an icon.
<span data-tooltip-icon="game-icon game-icon-bleeding-heart" data-tooltip-head="Tooltip header" title="Tooltip text">Tooltip with a header and an icon.</span>
Tooltip with image.
<span data-tooltip-image="https://2img.net/placehold.co/60/777/222.png" data-tooltip-head="Tooltip header" title="Tooltip text">Tooltip with image.</span>
Complete tooltip.
<span data-tooltip-image="https://2img.net/placehold.co/60/777/222.png" data-tooltip-icon="game-icon game-icon-bleeding-heart" data-tooltip-head="Tooltip header" title="Tooltip text">Complete tooltip.</span>
Complete tooltip with group color.
<span data-tooltip-image="https://2img.net/placehold.co/60/777/222.png" data-tooltip-icon="game-icon game-icon-bleeding-heart" data-tooltip-head="Tooltip header" title="Tooltip text" style="--group:darkred;">Complete tooltip with group color.</span>
truesight_styling_content: You can edit Truesight however you want in your CSS. By default, the tooltip will have this HTML (complete):<div id="truesight"><div><div class="ts-image"><img src="https://2img.net/placehold.co/60/777/222.png" alt=""></div><div class="ts-image"><em class="game-icon game-icon-bleeding-heart"></em></div><div class="ts-head">Tooltip header</div><div class="ts-text">Tooltip text</div></div></div>Truesight comes with a basic CSS that can adapt to every skin by changing its CSS variables, that you can find in truesight.css. Editing is allowed and encouraged!
truesight_credits_content: Please, visibly include in your credits the following code:This skin uses the tooltip system <b>"Truesight"</b> (<a href="https://necodemancer.github.io/schoolofnecromancy/truesight/">Usage guide</a>) made by <a href="https://necromancercoding.tumblr.com/">Necromancer Coding</a>.This helps the code reach other potential users and also that your users can have the Truesight guide at hand. If you don't want to include the link to this guide, you can create your own and directly link to my tumblr.
